name: Crispy Coconut Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Spray a large baking sheet with nonstick spray.
2. Sprinkle the shrimp evenly with the seasoning blend and black pepper. Place flour, egg, and shredded coconut in three separate small bowls.
3. Dip each shrimp first in the egg, then in the flour, followed by back in the egg, and finally in the shredded coconut. Arrange the shrimp on the baking sheet.
4. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden and crisp.
Great served alongside low-calorie, warmed orange marmalade as a dipping sauce.
Each serving provides: 1.5 protein, 1 bread, 15 calories. Per serving: 173 calories
Source: Weight Watchers Magazine, June 1993
